lines.english: What was the danger to the villages after the fire?
lines.chinese: 火灾过后，村庄面临的危险是什么？
lines.raw: What was the danger to the villages after the fire? | 火灾过后，村庄面临的危险是什么？

lines.english: Firemen had been fighting the forest fire for nearly three weeks before they could get it under control.
lines.chinese: 消防队员们同那场森林大火搏斗了将近3个星期才把火势控制住。
lines.raw: Firemen had been fighting the forest fire for nearly three weeks before they could get it under control. | 消防队员们同那场森林大火搏斗了将近3个星期才把火势控制住。

lines.english: A short time before, great trees had covered the countryside for miles around.
lines.chinese: 不久前，大树还覆盖着周围几英里长的乡村。
lines.raw: A short time before, great trees had covered the countryside for miles around. | 不久前，大树还覆盖着周围几英里长的乡村。

lines.english: Now, smoke still rose up from the warm ground over the desolate hills.
lines.chinese: 如今，烟雾依然从荒凉山丘的温暖地面上冉冉升起。
lines.raw: Now, smoke still rose up from the warm ground over the desolate hills. | 如今，烟雾依然从荒凉山丘的温暖地面上冉冉升起。

lines.english: Winter was coming on and the hills threatened the surrounding villages with destruction,
lines.chinese: 冬天快到了，这些山丘威胁着周围的村庄，要将它们毁灭，
lines.raw: Winter was coming on and the hills threatened the surrounding villages with destruction, | 冬天快到了，这些山丘威胁着周围的村庄，要将它们毁灭，

lines.english: for heavy rain would not only wash away the soil but would cause serious floods as well.
lines.chinese: 因为大雨不仅会冲走泥土，还会引起严重的水灾。
lines.raw: for heavy rain would not only wash away the soil but would cause serious floods as well. | 因为大雨不仅会冲走泥土，还会引起严重的水灾。

lines.english: When the fire had at last been put out,
lines.raw: When the fire had at last been put out, | 大火最终被扑灭后，

lines.english: the forest authorities ordered several tons of a special type of grass-seed which would grow quickly.
lines.chinese: 森林管理机构订购了几吨很快就能生长的特殊草籽。
lines.raw: the forest authorities ordered several tons of a special type of grass-seed which would grow quickly. | 森林管理机构订购了几吨很快就能生长的特殊草籽。

lines.english: The seed was sprayed over the ground in huge quantities by aeroplanes.
lines.chinese: 草籽由飞机大量地撒向地面。
lines.raw: The seed was sprayed over the ground in huge quantities by aeroplanes. | 草籽由飞机大量地撒向地面。

lines.english: The planes had been planting seed for nearly a month when it began to rain.
lines.chinese: 飞机撒播草籽将近一个月后，天下起了雨。
lines.raw: The planes had been planting seed for nearly a month when it began to rain. | 飞机撒播草籽将近一个月后，天下起了雨。

lines.english: By then, however, in many places the grass had already taken root.
lines.chinese: 然而，到那时许多地方的草已经生根了。
lines.raw: By then, however, in many places the grass had already taken root. | 然而，到那时许多地方的草已经生根了。

lines.english: In place of the great trees which had been growing there for centuries,
lines.chinese: 原本在那里生长了几个世纪的大树，
lines.raw: In place of the great trees which had been growing there for centuries, | 原本在那里生长了几个世纪的大树，

lines.english: patches of green had begun to appear in the blackened soil.
lines.chinese: 如今在焦黑的泥土上开始出现一片片绿色。
lines.raw: patches of green had begun to appear in the blackened soil. | 如今在焦黑的泥土上开始出现一片片绿色。
